title: Üskudar University Logo
content:
Üskudar University Logo

Turquoise Color:

The reason we choose turquoise color; blue represents eternity and green represents health. Turquoise color is used in holistic medicine due to its effect of healing diseases and calming people. As a university representing behavioral sciences, turquoise color was preferred for this reason.

4 Lines:

It represents the 4 core values of our university; Criticism, Libertarianism, Pluralism, Participation. As a university, we attach importance to democracy and express this in our logo.

Maiden's Tower:

The Maiden's Tower, which is thought to represent the elegance of young girlhood, the tenderness of the family, the excitement of youth, and the guidance of science, is therefore included in our logo.

Üsküdar:

It represents the crowning of Üsküdar, the center of science, culture and art, which saw the conquest of Istanbul, the intersection of eastern wisdom and western philosophy, with the university.
